text:
Created attachment 167179
Fix typo in libi386 PXENV_UNDI_INITIALIZE

This one actually has affected atleast one person, but the original site isn't around any longer:

> Well, first of all, about pxe.h. It has error in structure naming t_PXENV_UNDI_INITALIZE, it took some time to find, which letter is missed...

https://web.archive.org/web/20090516071429/http://blogs.freebsdish.org/taleks/2007/05/20/first-result/
